chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Has Been Reported Regarding Looking at Women

text: 4970 - وَ رَوَى اِبْنُ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنِ اَلْكَاهِلِيِّ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "اَلنَّظْرَةُ بَعْدَ اَلنَّظْرَةِ تَزْرَعُ فِي اَلْقَلْبِ اَلشَّهْوَةَ وَ كَفَى بِهَا لِصَاحِبِهَا فِتْنَةً".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4970 - It is narrated by Ibn Abi Umair from Al-Kahili who said that Abu Abdullah (as) said:
"A second glance after the first plants desire in the heart, and that is sufficient as a trial for its beholder."
